User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user profile stored in Firestore.

role.description: The role of the user, primarily for UI distinctions. Security is handled by custom claims.

Quiz.title: Quiz
Quiz.description: The main document for a quiz session.

title.description: Title of the quiz for this session.

status.description: The current state of the quiz.

currentQuestionIndex.description: The index of the currently active question.

questionCount.description: Total number of questions in the quiz.

questionStartAt.description: Server timestamp for when the current question was started.

timeLimit.description: The duration in seconds for the current question.

createdBy.description: The UID of the teacher who created the quiz.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the room was created.

QuizQuestion.title: QuizQuestion
QuizQuestion.description: A single question within a quiz. Publicly readable question data.

timer.description: The time limit for this question in seconds.

index.description: The order of the question in the quiz.

QuizAnswerKey.title: QuizAnswerKey
QuizAnswerKey.description: Server-only document containing the correct answer for a question.

QuizParticipant.title: QuizParticipant
QuizParticipant.description: Represents a user's participation and state within a quiz.

QuizSubmission.title: QuizSubmission
QuizSubmission.description: A student's submitted answer for a single question.

/quizzes/{quizId}.description: The root document for a single quiz session.

/quizzes/{quizId}/questions/{questionId}.description: Publicly visible data for each question in a quiz.

/quizzes/{quizId}/answerKeys/{questionId.description: Server-only correct answer data for each question.

/quizzes/{quizId}/participants/{userId}.description: A user's state, score, and status within a quiz.

/quizzes/{quizId}/questions/{questionId}.description: A student's submitted answer for a specific question. The document ID is the student's UID.
